home.hero.eyebrow: new AI business opportunities this week
home.hero.lede: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf and 15+ AI tools — tracked every week. We surface the business opportunities each update creates: what's missing, who competes, and why it matters now. Find your next startup idea — or discover the AI tools that already exist in each space.
home.feed.sub: Every opportunity shows the market gap, why it matters now, what's still missing, and who you'd compete with. Not building? Browse competitors to find AI tools already solving each problem.
home.feed.search.placeholder: Search a tool or topic — eval, skill, agent…
home.quotes.q1: I've been reading for three weeks. I abandoned two ideas after checking the report — one was already built, the other was saturated. That alone paid for the subscription.
home.quotes.q2: The competitor list alone is incredibly valuable. I wrote the competition slide in my pitch deck using this report.
home.quotes.q3: This isn't just a trending list. The why now and what's missing sections carry real analytical value — works like a VC research team.
home.footer.about: A weekly market-gap scanner for AI tools — tracking Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf and more. Business opportunities, competitor analysis, founder-grade signal, and a curated AI tools directory organized by market opportunity.
home.footer.sub.p: Weekly AI tools report, every Monday. Market gaps, business opportunities, competitive analysis — no spam.
